zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Dauntsey於大約1392年出生在英國維爾爾道千時，她的父親John de Dauntsey II36歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Beverley23歲。她於大約1408年與Sir Maurice Russell結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1457年3月4日之前，埋葬在英國維爾爾道千。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Dauntsey于大约1392年出生在英国維爾爾道千时，她的父亲John de Dauntsey II36岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Beverley23岁。她于大约1408年与Sir Maurice Russell结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1457年3月4日之前，埋葬在英国維爾爾道千。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Dauntsey was born about 1392, in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, her father, John de Dauntsey II, was 36 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Beverley, was 23. She married Sir Maurice Russell about 1408. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died before 4 March 1457, and was buried in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Dauntsey est née environ 1392, à Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Dauntsey II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Beverley, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Maurice Russell environ 1408. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée avant 4 mars 1457, et a été enterrée à Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Dauntsey um 1392 in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Dauntsey II 36 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Beverley 23. Sie hat um 1408 Sir Maurice Russell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb vor 4. März 1457 und wurde in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Dauntsey è nata il circa 1392 nel Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, John de Dauntsey II, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Beverley, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Maurice Russell circa 1408. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 4 marzo 1457, e fu sepolta a Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Dauntseyが約1392年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアダウントセイで生まれた時，父John de Dauntsey IIは36歳，母Lady Elizabeth Beverleyは23歳であった。約1408年にSir Maurice Russellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1457年3月4日以前に死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアダウントセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Dauntsey(이)가 대략 1392년 영국 윌츠히르 도츠이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Dauntsey II(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Beverley(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1408년 Sir Maurice Russell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1457년 3월 4일 이전 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 도츠이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Dauntsey nasceu aproximadamente 1392, em Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Dauntsey II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Beverley, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Maurice Russell aproximadamente 1408. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu antes 4 de março de 1457, e foi sepultada em Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Dauntsey родилась около 1392 г. в местности даунци, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Dauntsey II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Beverley, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Maurice Russell около 1408 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла перед 4 марта 1457 г. и была похоронена в местности даунци, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Dauntsey nació aproximadamente 1392, en Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Dauntsey II, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Beverley, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Maurice Russell aproximadamente 1408. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió antes de 4 de marzo de 1457, y fue sepultada en Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
